pg42-p1-s2:
They had said that though I did raise a defense, it would one day give way before some trivial reason for having
a drink.
pg42-p1-s3: Well, just that did happen and more, for what I had learned of alcoholism did not occur to me at all.
pg42-p1-s4:
I knew
from that moment that I had an alcoholic mind.
pg42-p1-s5:
I saw that will power and self-knowledge would not help in those strange
mental blank spots.
pg42-p1-s6: I had never been able to understand people who said that a problem had them hopelessly defeated.
pg42-p1:
again. They had said that though I did raise a defense, it would one day give way before some trivial reason for having
a drink. Well, just that did happen and more, for what I had learned of alcoholism did not occur to me at all. I knew
from that moment that I had an alcoholic mind. I saw that will power and self-knowledge would not help in those strange
mental blank spots. I had never been able to understand people who said that a problem had them hopelessly defeated. I
knew then. It was a crushing blow.
pg42-p2-s1: "Two of the members of Alcoholics Anonymous came to see me.
pg42-p2-s2:
They grinned, which I didn't like so much, and then asked me
if I thought myself alcoholic and if I were really licked this time.
pg42-p2-s3: I had to concede both propositions.
pg42-p2-s4:
They piled on
me heaps of evidence to the effect that an alcoholic mentality, such as I had exhibited in Washington, was a hopeless
condition.
pg42-p2-s5: They cited cases out of their own experience by the dozen.
pg42-p2-s6:
This process snuffed out the last flicker of
conviction that I could do the job myself.
pg42-p2:
"Two of the members of Alcoholics Anonymous came to see me. They grinned, which I didn't like so much, and then asked me
if I thought myself alcoholic and if I were really licked this time. I had to concede both propositions. They piled on
me heaps of evidence to the effect that an alcoholic mentality, such as I had exhibited in Washington, was a hopeless
condition. They cited cases out of their own experience by the dozen. This process snuffed out the last flicker of
conviction that I could do the job myself.
pg42-p3-s1: "Then they outlined the spiritual answer and program of action which a hundred of them had followed successfully.
pg42-p3-s2:
Though
I had been only a nominal churchman, their proposals were not, intellectually, hard to swallow.
pg42-p3-s3:
But the program of
action, though entirely sensible, was pretty drastic.
pg42-p3-s4:
It meant I would have to throw several lifelong conceptions out of
the window.
pg42-p3-s6:
But the moment I made up my mind to go through with the process, I had the curious
feeling that my alcoholic condition was relieved, as in fact it proved to be.
pg42-p3:
"Then they outlined the spiritual answer and program of action which a hundred of them had followed successfully. Though
I had been only a nominal churchman, their proposals were not, intellectually, hard to swallow. But the program of
action, though entirely sensible, was pretty drastic. It meant I would have to throw several lifelong conceptions out of
the window. That was not easy. But the moment I made up my mind to go through with the process, I had the curious
feeling that my alcoholic condition was relieved, as in fact it proved to be.
pg42-p4-s1: "Quite as important was the discovery that spiritual principles would solve all my problems.
